action.reasoning: Observation: After 12 iterations, best nav_seek_success is still 0.0. Custom pathfinder branch in model.py performed poorly (avg_dist ~5.5m, safe_steps ~79). The built-in habitat `ShortestPathFollower` is the literature's heuristic expert component; using it should outperform our buggy custom pathfinder. Before integrating it into model.py/predict.py, I must verify that it works with the multi-agent RearrangeSim. The follower needs the robot's position; in multi-agent envs the classic `env.sim.get_agent_state()` may not track the articulated agent (Spot). I will write a test script that wraps the sim to expose Spot's base_pos/base_rot via `get_agent_state`, instantiate `ShortestPathFollower`, and run 40 steps to see if Euclidean distance to the human decreases. If it works, I'll integrate next iteration.
